description: Baseline: Quality scoring tests all passing (13/13), avg_quality_score=0.85
Expanded temporal marker detection: added "currently", "recently", "last session", date patterns (2026-, 2025-, 2024-), etc.
Per-memory-type substance thresholds: Procedural/Conceptual accept 30+ words (vs 50+ for others), max 500 words (vs 300)
Enhanced abstraction detection: added "i created", "i implemented", "i worked", "completed", "finished the" patterns
Improved genericity detection: added "myself", "yourself", "ourselves", "yourselves", "mine", "yours", "their", "our project", "my implementation", "our team"
Refined temporal independence scoring: graduated penalty based on marker count (0→0.95, 1→0.65, 2→0.45, 3→0.25, 4+→0.10)
Refined task independence: graduated penalties (no issues→0.95, TODO→0.75, prefix→0.50, both→0.30)
Weight adjustment: increased temporal_independence (0.25→0.35), reduced genericity (0.20→0.15), abstraction (0.20→0.15), task_independence (0.15→0.10)
Enhanced abstraction detection: penalize instance-specific markers (TODO-, session-, date patterns) with 0.5 penalty
Memory-type contextual temporal scoring: Episodic allows more temporal markers (lighter penalties), others stricter
